sections.purpose: Overview section — eyebrow 'Overview', heading 'Elevate Your Practice — Literally', and two body paragraphs about Aerial Yoga at Bodhi

props.heading: Elevate Your Practice — Literally
paragraphs: Master the art of yoga in the air with our Aerial Yoga Teacher Training Course at Bodhi School of Yoga. Build strength, grace, and confidence while learning how to teach this unique and therapeutic style of yoga using hammock.

You'll combine traditional yoga postures with graceful aerial movements — learning how inversions decompress the spine, build core stability, and create a deeply healing experience for your future students.

components.notes: Text block left-aligned, max-width ~880. Likely heading-2 token + body-large token.

sections.purpose: Highlights section — eyebrow 'Highlights', heading 'What You'll Gain', then a 2-column x 3-row grid of 6 highlight cards (icon + title + short description)

items.title: Yoga Meets Flight
items.body: Combine traditional poses with graceful aerial movements.

items.title: Relieve & Realign
items.body: Inversions decompress the spine and boost flexibility.

items.title: Build Strength
items.body: Improve core stability, balance, and control.

items.title: Therapeutic & Fun
items.body: Enjoy emotional release through playful, healing practice.

items.title: Teach with an Edge
items.body: Gain a unique certification and grow your yoga career with a skill few teachers have.

items.title: Join a Community
items.body: Connect with passionate practitioners and expert teachers at Bodhi School of Yoga.

components.notes: Container width 1342, items 641x151~159 in a 2-col grid with 18px gap. Heading 'Strong → X' in Figma — the 'Strong →' prefix is just a Figma style annotation; use cleaned titles.

sections.purpose: FAQ accordion — eyebrow 'FAQ', heading 'Frequently Asked Questions', and 4 collapsible question rows (first one expanded showing the answer)

items.question: Do I need prior experience in aerial yoga?
items.answer: No prior aerial yoga experience is required. A basic understanding of yoga postures and physical fitness to perform inversions is sufficient to join this course.

items.question: Is this TTC Yoga Alliance certified?
Will I get to practice on hammocks during training?
Can this course help me start my own aerial yoga classes?

uncertain.reason: Section-nav strip 'Circulum' is mis-spelled in Figma; builder should likely use 'Curriculum' but flag with designer.

Eligibility (y=2313) and Curriculum (y=1968) frames overlap vertically (curriculum ends y=2313, eligibility starts y=2313 but eligibility frame width 2074 extends past viewport). Visually they are stacked; check the screenshot to confirm rendering order.
Eligibility checklist shows 6 items but only 3 unique labels (each repeated twice). Likely a Figma copy-paste; treat as 3 unique items unless designer confirms duplication intentional.

Two stray 'Background+Border' frames (1:7756, 1:7763) appear at x=1867/1966 with 'Business of Aerial Yoga / Building your brand and classes' content — they sit off-canvas (x>1920) within the curriculum group. May be hidden overflow cards from the carousel; ignore unless visible in screenshot.
The Figma body text node has width 1273 but its parent column is 441 wide — designer overflowed for absolute positioning. Treat as a single body paragraph constrained to ~880px max-width.
Heading reads 'Meet Your Instructor's' with the apostrophe — grammatically should be 'Instructors'. Use as-is but flag editorial.
Only the first FAQ item shows an answer in Figma; the other 3 are collapsed. Placeholder answers should be added by designer or marked TODO.
